SEARCH
Package minum.web

Class FullSystem

java.lang.Object
minum.web.FullSystem
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public class FullSystem extends Object implements AutoCloseable
This class is responsible for kicking off the entire system. In particular, look at start()

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    FullSystem(ILogger logger, ExecutorService es)
    This constructor is used when you want to provide the ILogger and ExecutorService.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    close()
     
    static void
    createSystemRunningMarker()
    this saves a file to the home directory, SYSTEM_RUNNING, that will indicate the system is active
    static Properties
    getConfiguredProperties()
    Gets values out of the properties file at app.config
    static Properties
    getConfiguredProperties(boolean showContents)
    This overload allows you to specify that the contents of the properties file should be shown when it's read.

    Instantiate a FullSystem with freshly-constructed values for ILogger and ExecutorService.

  • Constructor Details

    • FullSystem

      public FullSystem(ILogger logger, ExecutorService es)
      This constructor is used when you want to provide the ILogger and ExecutorService. It's easier if you use initialize() since it handles that for you.

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public static WebFramework initialize()
      Instantiate a FullSystem with freshly-constructed values for ILogger and ExecutorService.

    • start

      public FullSystem start() throws IOException
      This starts the system running, but you should not call this directly!!. Use initialize() instead. This is a method only needed if you need a bit greater control when starting, which is mostly just required for testing.
      Throws:
      IOException

    • removeShutdownHook

      public void removeShutdownHook()

    • createSystemRunningMarker

      public static void createSystemRunningMarker() throws IOException
      this saves a file to the home directory, SYSTEM_RUNNING, that will indicate the system is active
      Throws:
      IOException

    • getConfiguredProperties

      public static Properties getConfiguredProperties()
      Gets values out of the properties file at app.config

    • getConfiguredProperties

      public static Properties getConfiguredProperties(boolean showContents)
      This overload allows you to specify that the contents of the properties file should be shown when it's read.

    • getExecutorService

      public ExecutorService getExecutorService()

      public Server getServer()
